initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN store_sales ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'store') >= 1
    INTERSECT
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN web_sales ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'web') >= 1
    INTERSECT
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 'catalog') >= 1
) t
LIMIT 100

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk,
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS store_flag,
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ws_bill_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS web_flag,
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cs_bill_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS catalog_flag
        FROM customer
        LEFT JOIN store_sales ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        LEFT JOIN web_sales ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk OR d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk OR d_date_sk = cs_sold_date_sk
        WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    ) t
    WHERE store_flag >= 1 AND web_flag >= 1 AND catalog_flag >= 1
) final
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN store_sales ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
    INTERSECT
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN web_sales ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
    INTERSECT
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM customer
    JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
) AS customers_with_all_channels
LIMIT 100;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk
        FROM customer
        JOIN store_sales ON c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT c_customer_sk
        FROM customer
        JOIN web_sales ON c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT c_customer_sk
        FROM customer
        JOIN catalog_sales ON c_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
    ) AS all_sales
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN c_customer_sk IN (
            SELECT c_customer_sk 
            FROM customer 
            JOIN store_sales ON c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk 
            JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
            WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        ) THEN 1 END) >= 1
    AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN c_customer_sk IN (
            SELECT c_customer_sk 
            FROM customer 
            JOIN web_sales ON c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk 
            JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
            WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        ) THEN 2 END) >= 1
    AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN c_customer_sk IN (
            SELECT c_customer_sk 
            FROM customer 
            JOIN catalog_sales ON c_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk 
            JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
            WHERE d_month_seq = 1200
        ) THEN 3 END) >= 1
) AS multi_channel_customers
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) 
FROM (
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk
  FROM 
    customer
    JOIN store_sales ON c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE 
    d_month_seq = 1200
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  INTERSECT
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk
  FROM 
    customer
    JOIN web_sales ON c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE 
    d_month_seq = 1200
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  INTERSECT
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk
  FROM 
    customer
    JOIN catalog_sales ON c_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE 
    d_month_seq = 1200
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
) t
LIMIT 100
